settings.summary: Configure `scrollbar2` as a compact bar widget or a reserve-space floating panel. Theme-aware colors use Noctalia color pickers and also allow custom hex values.

colorPicker.label: Select color
colorPicker.desc: Choose a theme color or pick a custom color.

opacity.label: Transparency
opacity.desc: Expand to fine-tune opacity for this color.
opacity.valueDesc: Adjust how transparent this color should be.

mode.label: Placement
mode.desc: Choose whether the bar lives in the Noctalia bar or as a reserve-space floating panel.

scale.label: Floating Panel Scale
scale.desc: Scale the floating panel renderer without changing the saved base dimensions.

margin.label: Floating Panel Margin
margin.desc: Padding between the floating panel background and the bar itself.

offsetH.label: Horizontal Offset
offsetH.desc: Move the floating panel left or right from its centered position.

offsetV.label: Vertical Offset
offsetV.desc: Move the floating panel away from or toward the screen edge.

radiusScale.label: Background Radius Scale
radiusScale.desc: Scale the floating panel background corner radius.

backgroundColor.label: Background Color
backgroundColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel background, or `none`.

backgroundOpacity.label: Background Opacity
backgroundOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel background.

gradientEnabled.label: Enable Background Gradient
gradientEnabled.desc: Overlay a transparent-to-color gradient over the floating panel background.

gradientColor.label: Gradient Color
gradientColor.desc: Theme key or hex color for the floating panel gradient.

gradientOpacity.label: Gradient Opacity
gradientOpacity.desc: Opacity of the floating panel gradient.

gradientDirection.label: Gradient Direction
gradientDirection.desc: Choose whether the gradient runs vertically or horizontally.

sameOutput.label: Only Same Output
sameOutput.desc: Show only windows from the current screen.

position.label: Track Position
position.desc: For Floating Panel mode, pin the track to the top or bottom edge.

width.label: Track Width
width.desc: Width of the track as a percentage of the screen width.

verticalAlign.label: Track Alignment
verticalAlign.desc: Where the track line sits inside the transparent container.

borderRadius.label: Track Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the track line.

opacity.label: Track Opacity
opacity.desc: Overall opacity of the track line.

color.label: Track Color
color.desc: Theme key or hex color for the track line.

separatorColor.label: Separator Color
separatorColor.desc: Theme key or hex color applied to the track line between segments.

shadowEnabled.label: Enable Track Shadow
shadowEnabled.desc: Render a drop shadow under the track line.

display.label: Display & Floating Panel
display.desc: Placement mode and reserve-space floating panel settings.

track.label: Track Geometry
track.desc: Width, spacing, sizing, and alignment controls for the track line.

window.label: Window Labels
window.desc: Toggle labels, choose alignment, and configure typography and scaling.

trackColors.label: Track Color
trackColors.desc: Theme-aware color for the track line.

focusColors.label: Focus Colors
focusColors.desc: Focused, hover, and default colors used by the focus system.

windowColors.label: Window Colors
windowColors.desc: Icon and title colors for focused, hover, and default states.

filtering.label: Filtering
filtering.desc: Control which windows appear in the bar.

workspaceIndicator.label: Workspace Indicator
workspaceIndicator.desc: Show the active workspace beside the track with optional count badge styling.

specialWorkspaceOverlay.label: Special Workspace Overlay
specialWorkspaceOverlay.desc: Show the active Hyprland special workspace centered across the track.

pinnedApps.label: Pinned Apps
pinnedApps.desc: Render pinned launchers beside the track and manage per-app custom icons.

thickness.label: Focus Thickness
thickness.desc: Height of the moving focus indicator or the fade-state fill.

borderRadius.label: Focus Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the focus indicator.

verticalAlign.label: Focus Alignment
verticalAlign.desc: Where the focus strip sits inside the transparent container.

lineColor.label: Focus Line Color
lineColor.desc: Color of the moving focus indicator line.

focused.label: Focused Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for the active segment.

hover.label: Hover Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered segments.

default.label: Default Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for resting segments.

showIcon.label: Show Icons
showIcon.desc: Render application icons inside each segment.

showTitle.label: Show Titles
showTitle.desc: Render window titles inside each segment.

focusedOnly.label: Focused Only
focusedOnly.desc: Only show label content for the focused segment.

borderRadius.label: Window Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of each window segment background.

margin.label: Window Margin
margin.desc: Inset around each window segment background and its content.

paddingLeft.label: Left Padding
paddingLeft.desc: Left inner padding for window content inside each segment.

paddingRight.label: Right Padding
paddingRight.desc: Right inner padding for window content inside each segment.

font.label: Font Family
font.desc: Font family used for window titles.

fontSize.label: Font Size
fontSize.desc: Base size of the window title text.

focused.label: Focused Font Weight
focused.desc: Font weight used for focused window titles.

hover.label: Hover Font Weight
hover.desc: Font weight used for hovered window titles.

default.label: Inactive Font Weight
default.desc: Font weight used for inactive window titles.

iconScale.label: Icon Scale
iconScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to application icons.

iconAlign.label: Icon Alignment
iconAlign.desc: Horizontal alignment of icons inside each segment.

titleScale.label: Title Scale
titleScale.desc: Scale multiplier applied to title text.

titleAlign.label: Title Alignment
titleAlign.desc: Horizontal alignment of window titles inside each segment.

focused.label: Focused Icon Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused icons.

hover.label: Hover Icon Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered icons.

default.label: Default Icon Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle icons.

focused.label: Focused Title Color
focused.desc: Theme key or hex color for focused titles.

hover.label: Hover Title Color
hover.desc: Theme key or hex color for hovered titles.

default.label: Default Title Color
default.desc: Theme key or hex color for idle titles.

enabled.label: Enable Animation
enabled.desc: Animate focus movement and color changes.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose how the focus indicator transitions between windows.

enabled.label: Show Workspace Indicator
enabled.desc: Render the active workspace beside the window track.

labelMode.label: Workspace Text
labelMode.desc: Choose whether to show the active workspace id or name.

presetText.label: Preset Text
presetText.desc: Optional prefix text shown before the active workspace value.

position.label: Position
position.desc: Place the workspace indicator on the left or right side of the track.

verticalAlign.label: Vertical Position
verticalAlign.desc: Align the workspace indicator to the top, center, or bottom.

paddingX.label: Horizontal Padding
paddingX.desc: Inner horizontal padding for the workspace capsule.

paddingY.label: Vertical Padding
paddingY.desc: Inner vertical padding for the workspace capsule.

marginLeft.label: Left Margin
marginLeft.desc: Spacing on the left side of the workspace indicator.

marginRight.label: Right Margin
marginRight.desc: Spacing on the right side of the workspace indicator.

borderRadius.label: Border Radius
borderRadius.desc: Corner radius of the workspace indicator background.

background.label: Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the workspace indicator.

family.label: Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the workspace text.

size.label: Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the workspace text.

weight.label: Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the workspace text.

color.label: Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the workspace label.

badge.sectionDesc: Optional badge showing how many windows are on the active workspace for this screen.

enabled.label: Show Window Count Badge
enabled.desc: Render a badge with the active workspace window count.

background.label: Badge Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the count badge.

family.label: Badge Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the count badge text.

size.label: Badge Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the count badge text.

weight.label: Badge Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the count badge text.

color.label: Badge Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the count badge.

animation.sectionDesc: Animate the workspace indicator when the active workspace changes.

enabled.label: Animate On Change
enabled.desc: Animate the workspace label and badge when the active workspace changes.

type.label: Animation Type
type.desc: Choose the motion style for workspace indicator changes.

axis.label: Animation Axis
axis.desc: Slide the workspace indicator horizontally or vertically during changes.

speed.label: Animation Speed
speed.desc: Transition duration in milliseconds for workspace changes.

enabled.label: Show Special Workspace Overlay
enabled.desc: Render a centered overlay across the track when this screen has an active Hyprland special workspace.

textMode.label: Label Mode
textMode.desc: Choose whether to show the stripped special workspace name, the raw Hyprland name, or a fixed custom label.

customLabel.label: Custom Label
customLabel.desc: Fixed text shown when the label mode is set to custom.

showWindowIcons.label: Show Window Icons
showWindowIcons.desc: Render icons for windows currently open on the active special workspace to the right of the overlay label.

widthPercent.label: Overlay Width
widthPercent.desc: Width of the overlay as a percentage of the track width.

heightPercent.label: Overlay Height
heightPercent.desc: Height of the overlay as a percentage of the available track container height.

background.label: Background
background.desc: Background color and opacity for the special workspace overlay.

family.label: Font Family
family.desc: Font family used for the overlay label.

size.label: Font Size
size.desc: Base size of the overlay label text.

weight.label: Font Weight
weight.desc: Font weight used for the overlay label.

color.label: Text Color
color.desc: Text color and opacity for the overlay label.

position.label: Position
position.desc: Place the pinned apps strip on the left or right side of the track.

iconColor.label: Icon Color
iconColor.desc: Theme key or hex color applied to pinned app icons.

marginLeft.label: Left Margin
marginLeft.desc: Spacing on the left side of the pinned apps strip.

marginRight.label: Right Margin
marginRight.desc: Spacing on the right side of the pinned apps strip.

hideWhenActive.label: Hide When Active
hideWhenActive.desc: Hide a pinned app whenever this widget already shows a visible window for that app.

activateRunningBehavior.label: When Already Running
activateRunningBehavior.desc: Choose whether clicking a visible pinned app focuses and cycles its visible windows or starts a new instance.

items.label: Pinned App Overrides
items.desc: Manage pinned apps added from the context menu and set custom icons for each one.
items.empty: No pinned apps yet. Right-click a window segment and choose Pin to bar.

section.label: Presets
section.desc: Save, load, and manage configuration presets.

builtin.label: Built-in Presets
builtin.desc: Curated starting points that cannot be modified.

empty.label: No custom presets yet
empty.desc: Save your current settings to create a preset.

save.title: Save Preset
save.desc: Save your current settings as a new preset.
save.nameDesc: A short name for this preset.
save.nameTooLong: Name must be 32 characters or less.
save.descTooLong: Description must be 120 characters or less.
save.nameExists: A preset with this name already exists.

delete.title: Delete Preset
delete.desc: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

deleteAll.title: Delete All Custom Presets
deleteAll.desc: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} custom presets? This cannot be undone.

rename.title: Rename Preset
rename.desc: Enter a new name for this preset.

bordered.name: Bordered
bordered.desc: Thick track with sharp corners and visible separators.

floating.name: Floating
floating.desc: Floating panel with background and gradient.

indicator.name: Indicator
indicator.desc: Track and focus line only, no window content.

pill.name: Pill
pill.desc: Fully rounded track with smooth focus indicator.
